name: Boule De Neige
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 sticks unsalted butter at room temperature
1 oz dark rum or coffee liqueur (optional)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch loaf pan.
In a double boiler, melt chocolate, coffee and sugar over low heat. Set aside for 10 minutes to cool slightly.
Remove from heat and stir in butter until incorporated.
Add eggs one at a time; beat well after each addition.
If using, add dark rum or coffee liqueur now and mix gently.
Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan and bake for 1 hour or until puffed and cracked. Let cool completely on a rack before refrigerating overnight.
To serve:
In a large bowl, whip cream until stiff peaks form.
Scoop chocolate portions from the cooled cake onto plates.
Pipe whipped cream over each piece using an ice cream scoop and pastry bag fitted with a star tip.
